name: Mailchimp for Neto

Sync your store data, send targeted campaigns to your customers, and sell more stuff! Get Mailchimp for Neto, your best business resource in just a few clicks. And best of all? No coding necessary\u2014just a simple connection for a booming business."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Benefits & Features"}], "data-id": "benefits-features"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "With "}, {"text": "Mailchimp for Neto", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0you can:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Send abandoned cart recovery emails and follow-ups."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add personalised product recommendations to your emails."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Send your targeted sales to customers based on their past purchases."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add drag-and-drop product blocks to your EDMs."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Automate your product follow-ups, review requests and welcome series."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Segment your mailing list based on Neto customer groups and sales channels."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Always have access to the latest Mailchimp features."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "...and much more!"}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up Mailchimp for Neto"}], "data-id": "setup-instructions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sign up to Mailchimp for Neto\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://mailchimpforneto.com/", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": ". Once you have an account:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your\u00a0Neto control panel navigate to the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the "}, {"text": "Mailchimp for Neto", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0add-on (in the marketing section) and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Mailchimp for Neto add-on will be installed. Click the "}, {"text": "Configure Mailchimp for Neto", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You'll be redirected to the Mailchimp for Neto site to authenticate your account. Click the "}, {"text": "Connect To MailChimp", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter your Mailchimp username and password."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the list in Mailchimp that you want your Neto customers added to."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Proceed", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and enter your payment information."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Complete the wizard to finalise your Mailchimp for Neto integration."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\u00a0"}]}]
